calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (163-A Liberty St, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Harrington for and with (administrator) Peter Magnani.

The Court stated that there are no issues and that the sale can proceed. The sale of improved real property was confirmed at $850,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed November 4, 2016. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The Court confirmed that bond has been waived.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
